'''Doe See'ybark Bootana''', or "'''The Sail Barge Garden'''" in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], was a restaurant in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was made out parts of the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] old sail barge, which was used to line the interior of the establishment. It served good food and drinks in a quiet, sun-dappled, romantic atmosphere, and accepted [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from both the waning [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
